assets.title: Panorama of Blackwell's Island, N.Y.
assets.source: Library of Congress, National Screening Room
assets.license: Library of Congress reports no known U.S. copyright restrictions for the vast majority of this collection; rights assessment remains the user's responsibility
assets.description: A 1903 boat panorama of Blackwell's Island showing the lighthouse, asylum, workhouse, almshouse, penitentiary, Charity Hospital, seawall, and Queensboro Bridge piers. Provided for historical context only.

assets.description: Emma Goldman speaking and gesturing while holding a paper, cataloged here as circa 1916. Wikimedia Commons describes the source photograph as undated, so the year remains approximate.
